module TopModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire start,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg tx,
    output reg busy
);

    uart_tx uart_inst (
        .clk(clk),
        .reset(reset),
        .start(start),
        .data_in(data_in),
        .tx(tx),
        .busy(busy)
    );

endmodule
